Technical details.Modes: S, S/T, CPAP, PC, T, VAT (VAPS)

description_text:
Oxymed AirSmart BPAP ST 

Oxymed AirSmart is a BiPAP machine with ST mode, German Turbine and Swiss Sensor. The machine has advanced features with detachable design. 


	VAT Technology (VAPS Mode)


Innovative VAT technology helps adults suffering from Chronic Respiratory Failure by precisely targeting the Tidal Volume. It has customize Pressure Support to suit your needs. and easily adjust IPAP and EPAP settings for maximum comfort.


	Trigger and Shifting Sensitivity


Oxymed AirSmart BPAP ST has customized settings between 1 to 3 for each breath's start and end, ensuring better patient-device synchronization.


	Leakage Compensation


AirSmart is designed to adjust the pressure up to 60 mL/min based on mask leak, to make sure that the prescribed pressure is delivered to the patient.


	Mobile Connectivity


Monitor your sleep therapy remotely with mobile app connectivity. Data can be accessed anytime, anywhere.


	Ergonomically Screen display


The vibrant TFT screen with a user-friendly 17° ergonomic angle, offering not only ease of use but also an interactive interface


	Warranty 


Oxymed AirSmart BiPAP ST comes with 3 years warranty with home service PAN India.

What's in the Box?


	Device
	Heated Humidifier
	Hose pipe
	Adapter with 2pin wire
	Pendrive
	Filter
	Travel bag
	User manual
